case_title: HALILI, ROLANDO vs. MCDONALD'S RESTAURANT et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-06-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), FOR PROOF OF SERVICE OR DISMISSAL. SANCTIONS ON 1/7/97 ARE STILL PAYABLE BY END OF TODAY 4:30 PM. IF NO COMPLIANCE WITH TODAY'S OSC THE SHOW CAUSE ORDER WILL INCLUDE A RESPONSE BY PLAINTIFF AS TO WHY FURTHER SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED. HEARING SET FOR MAR-10-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-10-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE OSC FOR DISMISSAL BASED ON SETTLEMENT OR CRC 525 DECLARATION. DISMISSAL IS BASED ON PLTF'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR APR-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HALILI, ROLANDO AS TO DEFENDANT MCDONALD'S RESTAURANT DOES 1 TO 100 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-03-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-13-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-03-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-07-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-07-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-07-1997, SANCTION FOR $50 ON PLFF'S COUNSEL FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY FURTHE SANCTIONS SHD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-06-1997 CONTINUED FROM JAN-07-1997 TO FEB-06-1997 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF HALILI, ROLANDO

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-07-1997, DISMISSAL FOR PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR AT OSC TODAY, 1-7-97 OSC,12-3-96 SC, FAILURE TO FILE POS. DISMISSAL IS BASED ON CCP 575.2 & CASE OF CA CASUALTY VS MENDOZA (1995) 36 CA 4TH 678.
